turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, hello. Main appointment cancel karna chahta hoon. Actually main bahar hun out of town, wapas aa nahi sakta.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Koi baat nahi. Aapka naam aur registered number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapki appointment Dr. Hemant Shirke ke saath, kal dono baje ki hai. Cancel karni hai ya shift karni hai?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Shift karo, uh, agli week Friday ko same time rakh sako toh.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Friday next week, 2 PM — Dr. Shirke available hain. Confirm karta hoon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ho gayi reschedule! Friday agle hafte, 2 PM, Dr. Hemant Shirke ke saath. SMS aa jayega. Aap jaldi wapas aana!
